name: pi-agent-router
description: Pi extension for active-agent routing, controlled subagent delegation, and task result rendering.

scripts.test: bun ./src/test.ts && bun ./src/test/active-agent-prompt-test.ts && bun ./src/test/agent-discovery-test.ts && bun ./src/test/config-test.ts && bun ./src/test/delegated-extensions-test.ts && bun ./src/test/display-enhancements-test.ts && bun ./src/test/output-contract-test.ts && bun ./src/test/output-sanitizer-test.ts && bun ./src/test/parallel-control-test.ts && bun ./src/test/parallel-result-activity-test.ts && bun ./src/test/session-paths-test.ts && bun ./src/test/spinner-surface-test.ts && bun ./src/test/subagent-memory-regression-test.ts && bun ./src/test/subagent-output-sink-test.ts && bun ./src/test/subagent-output-test.ts && bun ./src/test/subagent-process-lifecycle-test.ts && bun ./src/test/subagent-runtime-env-test.ts && bun ./src/test/subagent-session-state-test.ts && bun ./src/test/subagent-key-distribution-entitlement-test.ts && bun ./src/test/task-controls-test.ts && bun ./src/test/task-display-formatting-test.ts && bun ./src/test/task-render-hints-test.ts && bun ./src/test/task-chain-mode-test.ts && bun ./src/test/task-tool-adapter-test.ts && bun ./src/test/task-update-dedupe-test.ts && bun ./src/test/tool-formatting-test.ts && bun ./src/test/ui-utils-test.ts
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test
